name: obsidian-wechat-converter
description: Turn notes into WeChat Official Account articles, Xiaohongshu image cards, and Feishu docs, with live preview.

scripts.generate:runtime: npm run generate:embedded && npm run generate:ai-layout-runtime && npm run generate:styles
scripts.check:runtime: npm run check:embedded && npm run check:ai-layout-runtime && npm run check:styles
scripts.build: npm run generate:runtime && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.review:guard: npm run scan:guard && npm run check:build-artifacts && npm test -- --run && npm run release:pack && npm run release:validate
scripts.deploy:server: rsync -avz --delete --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude '.env' --exclude '*.log' ./server/ root@115.190.207.149:/var/www/wechat-proxy/ && ssh root@115.190.207.149 'cd /var/www/wechat-proxy && npm install --production && (pm2 restart wechat-proxy || pm2 start ecosystem.config.js)'

author: 本地自维护
